title: Queues
excerpt: description: Produce and consume Cloudflare Queues messages using the Workers JavaScript API. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/queues/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Cloudflare Queues is integrated with [Cloudflare Workers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers). To send and receive messages, you must use a Worker. A Worker that can send messages to a Queue is a producer Worker, while a Worker that can receive messages from a Queue is a consumer Worker. It is possible for the same Worker to be a producer and consumer, if desired.
